body:
_**Notice: I will soon be migrating this project and it's features over to a new mod, Nod3py's Customs. When available, please consider downloading at the following page: [https://modrinth.com/mod/nod3pyscustoms](https://modrinth.com/mod/nod3pyscustoms)**_

# Armor Begone

Armor Begone is a project I've been waiting for for 3 years that I finally decided to create. For Hypixel Skyblock players at a top level, outside of various cosmetics to add to your armor, nothing showcases your personality better than your skin.

I'm here to fix that.

## What does it do?

Essentially, any armor or player head (textured skull item) worn by the player will not render, allowing for a full view of other player's skins in game.

![BeforeEnabling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04e673514b21f47c2a2b3f09b5e36434d8e9171f_0.webp)

![AfterEnabling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d01d6eeb02cb1cbbc78d07238ad1147a7caf7292_0.webp)

## The Future

I am currently only going to be supporting fabric for 1.21.1 for the time being. From what I know of this is the best version of the game to be running mods for Hypixel Skyblock on that will be supported come the foraging update.

This is also my first mod, so realistically it's gonna take me a while to get the ball rolling :p

### Issues:
- When enabled, skull items sometimes may not render in your hotbar.

# Requirements

- Cloth Config
- Mod Menu
- Fabric API
